Privacy PolicyPRIVACY POLICYThis privacy policy describes the information we (“vidyakul.com”, “site”, “app”, “website”, “we” or “us”)                    may collect from you or that you may provide to us when you visit ‘vidyakul.com’. This privacy                    policy information covers what information is collected, what we do with it, and what you can do                    about                    it. You can use this information to make your decisions about your privacy.‘Vidyakul’

act as a marketplace for online learning courses                    and                    provide services to let you enrol in variety of courses published by Vidyakul.By using the site, services or courses you consent to the collection, use and disclosure of your                    personal                    identifiable site information (any information related to your use of site or service, without                    limitation, such as enrolment)

And course information (any information related to taking the Courses, including, without limitation,                    interchanges with the course tutors, other students (“Users”), other items submitted to satisfy                    course                    requirements) as applicable in accordance with the privacy policy.

Disclaimer Regarding NCERT ContentAll the NCERT books provided in the application are sourced directly from the official website of the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) and are available for free public use. NCERT, as a governmental organization, offers these educational materials for the benefit of students and educators without any copyright restrictions.

Our platform does not claim any rights over these materials nor do we modify or rebrand them in any way. We provide these resources to our users in the same spirit as NCERT, to support educational advancement. All rights, including the copyrights and the ownership of the content, belong to their respective authors and the NCERT.

We acknowledge and respect the rights of the original authors and NCERT, and we confirm that our use of these materials is in compliance with the terms set by NCERT and applicable laws. For more details or to access the original materials, users are encouraged to visit the official NCERT website.

THIRD PARTY LINKSThe Site, Services and in particular the Courses, may provide links to third party web sites or                    resources                    not associated with us and over which we do not have control (“External Web Sites”). Such links do                    not                    constitute an endorsement by Vidyakul of the External Web Sites, the content displayed therein, or                    the

persons or entities associated therewith. You acknowledge that Vidyakul is only providing these                    links as                    a convenience, and cannot be responsible for the content of such External Web Sites.
Your consentBy using our site, you are consent to our privacy policy.

Refund PolicyOur mission is to provide quality and relevant learning to students across the globe. However, we                    understand that not all content is exactly relevant for everyone. Therefore, students purchasing                    courses                    on Vidyakul are protected under a 7 day refund policy.This policy is to ensure that courses on Vidyakul provide full satisfaction and value to students.

Students not satisfied with the course for any reason can get full refund on their purchase                    (excluding                    payment gateway charges).How to request for refund:Students who need a refund should send an e-mail to “info@vidyakul.com” with the followingName of the courseYour Vidyakul account emailCourse purchase confirmation receipt andThe reason(s) for refund.Your request for refund will be processed for approval with 2 weeks of your email. Once approved, it

might take up to 4 weeks for the money to be credited to your account. Students can also choose to                    get                    the money refunded as Vidyakul credit that could be used for future course purchases. Students                    choosing                    for Vidyakul credit would get a refund within 3 days after approval.Exceptions:While we strive to provide refunds to all students who do not find it satisfactory, however there are                    few

cases where refunds could be revokedIf a student participates in the entire course or has downloaded the course before the refund                        was                        requested, the refund might be not approvedStudents who wish to purchase a course after claiming refund on that course before are not                        eligible                        for refund on the same course againStudents who purchase and refund multiple courses over a period of time

Our refund policy is offered to protect students get the right value from our platform and evaluate                    the                    course. However, we also need to protect our instructors from fraud and provide a reasonable                    expectation                    of being paid. Therefore, we have limited the time for refund. We do NOT offer refunds for courses                    after                    the 7 day refund period.

ACCOUNT DELETIONIf you wish to delete your account, please send an email to our customer care team at info@vidyakul.com. Our team will review your request and reach out to you for confirmation. Upon your confirmation, we will delete your account within 96 hours.

CHANGES TO PRIVACY POLICYThis privacy policy terms may change time to time and we reserve the right to change the terms of                    this                    privacy policy at any time. When we update the privacy policy, all our registered users will be                    notified                    via email.
